entry.title: Re: Is it impossible to connect by client when connecting...
entry.content:
However, as a "workaround", you could implement this requirement yourself in your JCo Server Program:

JCo passes an object of type "JCoServerContext" into your function handler method. By using a code snippet like the following, you can check the client, from which the RFC request is coming, and if it doesn't come from the "allowed" client, abort the call by throwing a JCoException with error code JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE or something like that:

 

JCoAttributes attr = serverContext.getConnectionAttributes();
String client = attr.getClient();
if (!client.equals("100"))
    throw new JCoException(JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE, "Only calls from client 100 allowed");

entry.title: Re: Privileged Access Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: A Comprehensive Guide
entry.content:
Hello Samuel,

In the public cloud the security audit logs are active by default. You cannot modify the audit log configuration similar to on-premise.

The security audit logs are important for PAM logs, however the log collection for S/4HANA public cloud is not working yet because of some time synchronization between IAG and S/4HANA.

We are currently manually downloading the audit logs and uploading them to the PAM monitoring request.

Regards,

Subbu Iyer

entry.title: Enhancing SAP Digital Manufacturing with Extended iDoc: Addressing the Absence of Operation Long Tex
entry.content:
Introduction

In the manufacturing process, timely access to detailed instructions is vital for smooth operations. SAP Digital Manufacturing (SAP DM) users face a common issue where Operation Long Text, critical for understanding operational steps, is not included in the iDocs (LOIPRO) transferred from SAP ERP. Although this information is available via SOAP messages in SAP ERP, the standard integration between SAP ERP and SAP DM relies on iDocs, leading to missing long text data on the shop floor.

This blog explores two approaches to solve this issue:

  1. Extending the LOIPRO iDoc in SAP ERP by adding a custom field to include Operation Long Text.
  2. Using a custom BAPI and a PreXSLT iFlow in SAP CPI to enrich the iDoc with Operation Long Text before mapping it to SAP DM fields.

Regardless of the chosen method, the SAP DM segment `<pp:LongText>` will be used to map the custom field from the iDoc.

Understanding the Challenge

SAP ERP uses LOIPRO iDocs to send production and process order information to SAP DM. However, by default, these iDocs do not contain Operation Long Text, which includes crucial instructions for shop floor operators. Although SAP ERP provides this information through SOAP messages, integrating SOAP-based data adds unnecessary complexity, as SAP DM primarily relies on iDocs.

To bridge this gap, you can either extend the LOIPRO iDoc to include a custom field for long text or use a custom BAPI with SAP CPI to retrieve and enrich the iDoc with this information. In either approach, the SAP DM segment `<pp:LongText>` will be used for mapping the long text, but the field name in the iDoc can be customized according to customer preferences.

 

Approach 1: Extending the iDoc in SAP ERP

A simple solution to this issue is extending the LOIPRO iDoc to include a custom field that holds the Operation Long Text. The customer can define the name of this custom field as per their business requirements.

  • Extend the iDoc structure: Add a custom field to the LOIPRO iDoc to store the Operation Long Text. This custom field can have any name, depending on the customer’s preferences. Once added, this field will contain the operation-specific long text, which can later be mapped to SAP DM.
  • Mapping to SAP DM: After the custom field is added to the iDoc, it must be mapped to the SAP DM payload segment `<pp:LongText>` during the data integration process. This segment is part of the SAP DM payload and is used to display long text within SAP DM.

Example of SAP DM Payload Mapping:

<pp:LongText pp:languageCode="" pp:MIMECode="text/plain" pp:TextCategory=""> 
         {CustomFieldFromIDocContainingLongText}
</pp:LongText>

In this case, the custom field from the iDoc is mapped to the `<pp:LongText>` segment in SAP DM.   This will be displayed in SAP DM in the Operation/Phase details for the Routing/Recipe. 

Approach 2: Custom BAPI with PreXSLT iFlow in SAP CPI

For customers seeking more flexibility, another approach involves using a custom BAPI to retrieve the Operation Long Text and enriching the iDoc using a PreXSLT iFlow in SAP CPI.

  • Create a Custom BAPI: Develop a custom BAPI in SAP ERP that retrieves the Operation Long Text for all operations within a production or process order. This BAPI can return the long text in a structured format based on the requirements.
  • Use a PreXSLT iFlow in SAP CPI: 
    • The PreXSLT iFlow will call the custom BAPI/API to retrieve the Operation Long Text.
    • It will then enrich the iDoc with the retrieved long text, adding it as a custom field in the iDoc.
    • The enriched iDoc is then passed through the integration process.
  • Mapping to SAP DM: Similar to the iDoc extension in Approach #1, the custom field in the enriched iDoc will be mapped to the `<pp:LongText>` segment in SAP DM.

Why This Solution Matters

Both approaches—extending the iDoc or using a custom BAPI—ensure that Operation Long Text is included in the data transfer between SAP ERP and SAP DM. Here are the key benefits:

  • Customizable iDoc Structure: The iDoc can be extended with any custom field name for the long text, offering flexibility for different customer needs.
  • Streamlined Data Flow: By enriching the iDoc with long text, whether through direct extension or via CPI, all relevant information can be transferred to SAP DM using the existing iDoc-based integration.
  • Consistent XSLT Mapping: Both approaches use the same XSLT step to map the custom iDoc field to the `<pp:LongText>` segment in SAP DM, ensuring consistency and simplicity.

Conclusion

The absence of Operation Long Text in iDocs (LOIPRO) poses a challenge for SAP DM users. While SOAP messages can provide this data, relying on SOAP adds complexity. The solution lies in either extending the iDoc to include a custom field for long text or using a custom BAPI to enrich the iDoc via SAP CPI. In both cases, the custom iDoc field is mapped to the `<pp:LongText>` segment in SAP DM using a XSLT transformation in integration layer.

This approach streamlines the integration between SAP ERP and SAP DM, allowing shop floor operators to access critical instructions and improving overall production efficiency.

Note: This above blog is only applicable for SAP ECC and SAP S4Hana, not for S4HC.

entry.title: Re: Getting trial product key
entry.content: Hello. Your product key should be available in the SAP Service Marketplace under your account. You can log in to the portal and check under the "Software Downloads" section. URL: SAP Support Portal or, if you manage licenses via SAP's License Management System, you can log into your LMS account to retrieve your product key. This is commonly used to manage multiple SAP licenses.

entry.title: Re: Getting trial product key
entry.content: LINK: https://support.sap.com/en/index.html

entry.title: Re: jConnect version for HA functionality
entry.content: I have added the tag for the SAP ASE database. Perhaps the people over there understand your question?! But as Stefan already mentioned: "jConnect" does not seem to have anything to do with "JCo" (which is used for RFC communication and not for JDBC/database connectivity).

entry.title: need SAC Free trail access but not Guided Experience
entry.content:
Dear Team,       

I hope this message finds you well.  I am reaching out to inquire about obtaining access to the SAP Analytics Cloud free trial. When I attempted to register using the link below, I was directed to a Guided Experience, which I would prefer to avoid:
https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/cloud-analytics/trial-basic.html

Could you please provide me with the correct link or instructions to register for the trial without the Guided Experience? Your assistance in this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: Unable to run Cloud Connector on M2 or Intel processo...
entry.content:
This looks like it is caused by what was mentioned by Markus above:

"Furthermore, you need to provide an exception for the libsapscc20jni.dylib in security settings to be allowed to run, even though it is not notarized."

The dynamic library libsapscc20jni.dylib is located in the lib/native directory of the SCC installation directory.

entry.title: Re: SAP BUILD APPS is showing subscription error even wit...
entry.content: It got solved 😀, Please follow the step of Cloud Identity service registration and run booster again, it will solve the issue

entry.title: SOP or Rough cut Planning & source of demands which can be copied to MD62
entry.content:
Intro

Let us have a brief about the SOP. Reference Blog

Demands in MD61 are considered while running MRP. Then why we need to maintain demands in SOP or RCP?

SOP or RCP are similar and it is just a excel sheet in SAP where the sales and production team will give there demands and capacity respectively. Later these demand will be consolidated and transferred from SOP (excel table) to MD61 table in proportional manner.

So this is just an alternate method of filling the PIR in SAP. But instead of directly maintaining the demand in MD61, we are using SOP sheet as preliminary requirement report to collect the data and then transfer it to actual demand.

In PIR screen you might have seen these options to fill the demands. These options are used to copy the requirements from SOP or RCP

1. Forecasting - Demand which you generated in MP30 - Not an SOP

2. Sales plan & Production plan - (Standard SOP for Material) - MC95

3. Sales plan proportional PG & Production plan proport PG - (Standard SOP for product group) - MC94

4. Copy flexible planning - (Flexible planning) - MC95

Difference between the SOP types

Standard SOP for Material -  (Demands will be given at Material and Plant level and then copied to MD61)
Standard SOP for Product Group - (Demands will be given at Material and Product group and then copied)
Flexible Planning - (You can define your own characters to maintain the demand and then copied to MD61)
 
You can use the proper steps to follow each process. But here I am comparing the different SOP demands that can be copied to MD61 screen.
 
A) Forecast - Link 
  1. Maintain consumption values (MM02)
  2. Execute Forecast ( MP30)
MP30 screen
MD61 screen

You can see both the values from MP30 and MD61 screen are same. you can select the demand and transfer it to PIR

 
B) Standard SOP for Material - Characteristics are Material, Plant and key figures are Sales, Production Quantity, Target stock, etc.
1) Create Planning for material MC87 
2) Copy to Active Version MC78
3) Transfer to Demand Management MC74
 
MD95 screen. Here you can see the characters are material and plant. i.e. input parameters.
MD61 screen
Here you can see these values from the key figure sales are same as MD95.
Here you can see these values are from the key figures production are same as MD95.
 
B) Standard SOP for Product Group - Characteristics are material and product group.
 
1) Create Product Group MC84
2) Create Plan for Product Group MC81
3) Disaggregate Product Group Plan MC76
4) Copy to active version MC78
5) Transfer to Demand Management MC75 for PG
 
MC94 screen

Here you can see the input parameters are product group and the plant. 

MD61 screen

Here you can see the sales plan values from MC94 and MD61 are same.

Here you can see the production plan values from MC94 and MD61 are same.

 
C) Flexible Planning - Custom characteristics and Key figures.
 
1) Create Info structure - MC21
2) Maintain Planning Parameters - MC7F
3) Creation of Planning Hierarchy - MC61
4) Creation planning type and Macros - MC8A
5) Calculate Proportional Factors - MC9B
6) Planning in the planning table - MC93
7) Copy planning version - MC8V
😎 Transfer planning data to demand management - MC90
MC95

 

MD61

 

Here we can only transfer the data directly from MC95 to MD61.

 
Transfer to DM from change mode of Flexible Planning with active version MC94

Conclusion:

I hope you got some idea on SOP and RCP. Also have a look on to link

entry.title: Re: NCo 3.1.5.0 SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcConfigParamet...
entry.content:
Are you running your application inside Visual Studio in debug mode?

Then you need to change the debugger settings and disable that VS breaks when this type of exception is thrown. NCo tries to find out, in which kind of environment it is running (Console App, ASP.NET app, Azure, etc) and trying to detect this may cause an internal exception being thrown by the .NET runtime, however NCo catches this and then continues "as normal". Only Visual Studio doesn't realize that the exception is handled later and triggers an "Exception-Breakpoint" when a type initializer exception is thrown...

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Landscape of the Future
entry.content: @Martin_Kuma: Thanks for your comment. Your comment made me realize that I did not mention BW once in this blog! That is definitely a first for me. BW has been there since 1998 and I have been working with it since 2001. But BW's future is grim. Embedded analytics can replace most of its queries and Datasphere is an excellent and modern alternative. More on this topic in a next blog.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Landscape of the Future
entry.content: @amit777: Thanks for the compliment. I have two more blogs planned: a non-technical one on data warehousing and a very technical one for my fellow nerds on key figures in embedded analytics. You will enjoy the first. Apologies for the second.

entry.content:

I tried with many systems including S4 Hana and decentralized EWM. But all have the same error.

I can go to customizing via Spro, but also wonder about this T-code. Does anyone has an idea about it?

 

Best Regards

Bünyamin Atasoy

entry.title: Re: call classe methods below in another class code
entry.content: This does not look like a Connectivity question (HTTP or RFC communication). I am adding the "ABAP Development" tag.

entry.title: Re: Error Message "Internal error when calling operation module BUA_CHECK_ADDRESS_VALIDITY_ALL;
entry.content:
Hi All, I am getting the same error in RAP modeling. Can anyone help me on this.

My Code:

DATA:

ls_business_data TYPE zpatient_reg_scom=>tys_a_business_partner_addre_2,

lo_http_client TYPE REF TO if_web_http_client,

lo_client_proxy TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_client_proxy,

lo_request TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_request_create,

lo_response TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_response_create.

 

TRY.

DATA(v_guid) = cl_system_uuid=>if_system_uuid_static~create_uuid_c32( ).

CATCH cx_uuid_error INTO DATA(r_uuid_exc).

ENDTRY.

TRY.

" Create http client

TRY.

DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement(

comm_scenario = 'ZTEST' ).

CATCH cx_http_dest_provider_error.

"handle exception

ENDTRY.

* comm_system_id = '<Comm System Id>'

* service_id = '<Service Id>' ).

lo_http_client = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( lo_destination ).

lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_factory_remote=>create_v2_remote_proxy(

EXPORTING

is_proxy_model_key = VALUE #( repository_id = 'DEFAULT'

proxy_model_id = 'ZPATIENT_REG_SCOM'

proxy_model_version = '0001' )

io_http_client = lo_http_client

iv_relative_service_root = '' ).

 

ASSERT lo_http_client IS BOUND.

 

* Prepare business data

* Prepare business data

ls_business_data = VALUE #(

business_partner = '14035'

* address_id = '123'

validity_start_date = 20240916123000

validity_end_date = 99990101123000

* authorization_group = 'AuthorizationGroup'

address_uuid = v_guid

* additional_street_prefix_n = 'AdditionalStreetPrefixN'

* additional_street_suffix_n = 'AdditionalStreetSuffixN'

* address_time_zone = 'AddressTimeZone'

* care_of_name = 'CareOfName'

* city_code = 'CityCode'

city_name = 'Berhampore'

* company_postal_code = 'CompanyPostalCode'

country = 'IN'

* county = 'County'

* delivery_service_number = 'DeliveryServiceNumber'

* delivery_service_type_code = 'DeliveryServiceTypeCode'

* district = 'District'

* form_of_address = 'FormOfAddress'

* full_name = 'FullName'

* home_city_name = 'HomeCityName'

* house_number = 'HouseNumber'

* house_number_supplement_te = 'HouseNumberSupplementTe'

language = 'EN'

pobox = '733121'

* pobox_deviating_city_name = 'PoboxDeviatingCityName'

* pobox_deviating_country = 'PoboxDeviatingCountry'

* pobox_deviating_region = 'PoboxDeviatingRegion'

* pobox_is_without_number = abap_true

* pobox_lobby_name = 'PoboxLobbyName'

pobox_postal_code = '733121'

* person = 'Person'

postal_code = '733121'

* prfrd_comm_medium_type = 'PrfrdCommMediumType'

region = 'WB'

street_name = 'TEST'

* street_prefix_name = 'StreetPrefixName'

* street_suffix_name = 'StreetSuffixName'

* tax_jurisdiction = 'TaxJurisdiction'

* transport_zone = 'TransportZone'

* address_idby_external_syst = 'AddressIdbyExternalSyst'

* county_code = 'CountyCode'

* township_code = 'TownshipCode'

* township_name = 'TownshipName'

 

).

 

" Navigate to the resource and create a request for the create operation

lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'A_BUSINESS_PARTNER_ADDRESS' )->create_request_for_create( ).

" I dont know, How to pass to_address associiation in HTTP proxy need help here

lo_request->set_business_data( ls_business_data ).

 

" Execute the request

lo_response = lo_request->execute( ).

 

" Get the after image

*lo_response->get_business_data( IMPORTING es_business_data = ls_business_data ).

 

CATCH /iwbep/cx_cp_remote INTO DATA(lx_remote). " Here I am getting the mentioned error

 

 

 

CATCH /iwbep/cx_gateway INTO DATA(lx_gateway).

" Handle Exception

 

CATCH cx_web_http_client_error INTO DATA(lx_web_http_client_error).

" Handle Exception

RAISE SHORTDUMP lx_web_http_client_error.

 

ENDTRY.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Landscape of the Future
entry.content: @GERTJAN1: "Data Factory" is a term mainly used by MicroSoft for "Azure Data Factory". To describe Datasphere, SAP uses the more generic term "Data Fabric" (https://www.sap.com/resources/what-is-data-fabric). Data Factory, Data Fabric, such terms always make me wanna play some type of bingo 😉 .

entry.title: Re: Multiple Currencies in Project Builder
entry.content:
In SPRO, Project Profile, you can specify a currency.  Here is the F1 from that currency:

WBS currency (project definition)
The system defaults the currency from the project definition as the object currency for each newly created WBS element.

You can change the object currency for a WBS element in the organizational data for the WBS element, provided no costs or payments have been posted yet in the WBS element.

Dependencies
Note the following when you change the object currency for a WBS element:

If the controlling area and company code have the same currency, then you can specify an object currency for the work breakdown structure which is different. This currency becomes the project currency.
If the controlling area and company code have different currencies, the company code currency is the project currency.

entry.title: Re: Unlocking the productivity potential with S/4HANA's Production Planning Optimizer
entry.content: Great Blog Daniel! Very well articulated with the pragmatic example of challenges faced & how Advanced planning could support such scenarios.

entry.title: Re: How to derive the master data values from existing tr...
entry.content:
Try this. pls check all the syntax .


IF ([d/Factory] = "A" AND [d/Location] = "Seattle") THEN
DATA([d/Type] = "#", [d/Account] = "Sales Qty") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Type] = "X", [d/Account] = "Price");
ENDIF

IF ([d/Factory] = "B" AND [d/Location] = "California") THEN
DATA([d/Type] = "#", [d/Account] = "Sales Qty") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Type] = "Y", [d/Account] = "Price");
ENDIF

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: 3ª Feira Laboral SAP Future Talent | Brazil
entry.content: Ficamos contentes, Wesley! Esperamos te ver amanhã 😀

entry.title: 1ª Feria Laboral SAP Future Talent | LAC
entry.content:
El próximo 24 de septiembre a las 18:00 (ARG), te invitamos a participar en nuestra 1ª Feria Laboral SAP Future Talent, un evento dirigido a estudiantes universitarios que buscan dar el siguiente paso en su desarrollo profesional y explorar oportunidades de empleo en el mundo SAP.

SAP Future Talent es un programa de atracción de talentos orientado a quienes desean iniciar una carrera en consultoría SAP. Nuestro objetivo es apoyar a socios y clientes en la identificación de nuevos talentos y ofrecer capacitaciones especializadas para principiantes.

Durante la feria, tendrás la oportunidad de asistir a charlas exclusivas impartidas por colaboradores y socios de SAP, quienes compartirán información valiosa sobre el potencial de una carrera en SAP, en un entorno cada vez más impulsado por la inteligencia artificial y tecnologías avanzadas.

¡Y lo mejor: no hay costos para participar en esta feria!


No dejes pasar esta oportunidad única para conocer de cerca el programa SAP Future Talent y dar un impulso decisivo a tu carrera profesional.

¡Inscríbete ahora y comienza a construir tu futuro con SAP!

¡Esperamos verte allí!

entry.title: Contracts in Non-Stock Component
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How can we assign the contracts for a Non-Stock Component in Task List.

Regards,

Preethi.

entry.title: Re: call classe methods below in another class code
entry.content: Note that your code doesn't compile because you are using CL_CONTROL before declaring it, you are defining a class name before the instance operator (->). Either you refer to the method HANDLER as an instance method, then you must instantiate CL_CONTROL e.g. go_control = NEW cl_control( ), and you can do SET HANDLER go_control->handler, or you define HANDLER as a static method (CLASS-METHODS) and then you can use SET HANDLER cl_control=>handler...

entry.title: Re: Multiple Currencies in Project Builder
entry.content: That's what I said! "If you have assigned a number of company codes to a controlling area and the company codes have different currencies, you cannot allocate the object currency. The system automatically uses the local currency of the respective company code."

entry.content: Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Assembly Processing (PS)
entry.content: Try adding both materials to the Sales Order prior to saving then save both at the same time. Since the SO is creating and naming the WBS there might be a naming conflict with a new WBS.

entry.title: Re: Assembly Processing (PS)
entry.content: Same issue...

entry.title: Webinar on E-invoices in Germany with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance
entry.content:
We are excited to invite you to our upcoming webinar on e-invoices in Germany with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance! 

By attending the online session, you will gain knowledge on:

- the latest on B2B domestic e-invoicing being introduced in Germany with the  Growth Opportunity Act (Wachstumschancengesetz): what will come into effect when, the impacts to all companies operating in Germany, benefits and actions to be taken.

- how SAP Document and Reporting Compliance can help you comply with the new regulation and optimize your invoicing process.

- discover how similar legislation has been addressed in other countries and how you can get started.

Speakers:

  • Ulla Ringler, Localization Product Manager, Germany, SAP SE
  • Gert Eichberger, Localization Product Manager, MEE, SAP SE
  • Gabor Nagy, Architect, SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, Germany, SAP SE

Register here

entry.title: Re: Assembly Processing (PS)
entry.content: Please submit a support ticket to SAP Support. I looked up that error message number and there wasn't much.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have completed the "Configuring SAP Ariba Procurement" Learning journey as a part of the Digital Skills initiative. I want to avail the voucher for the certification for this course. 

My SAP Community username : Nikita_Agrawal

Application Text I posted on 07/19/2024 in this blog : 

Hi @David_Chaviano My name is Nikita Agrawal. I identify as a Woman looking to reenter the professional world after a career break. I have worked in the SAP space for around 6 years with expertise in ABAP, SAP SD, and SAP MM modules. I am interested to upgrade my skills and learn about SAP Ariba Procurement.

The Digital Skills Initiative would provide me with that platform to hone my skills and get certified, hence I am willing to sign up for the program.

entry.title: Schlumberger Digital Forum 2024 in Monaco Kick-Off
entry.content:
The SLB Digital Forum in Monaco is a premier event for leaders and experts in the digital space to come together and discuss the latest trends, challenges, and opportunities in the industry. Today the summit was kicked off by Schlumberger´s CEO Olivier Le Peuch speaking to more than 1.000 attendees. Emphasizing the relevance of the digital transformation, the focus of the event will be on latest technology, supported by leading tech companies such as Microsoft, Google, and SAP.

Kamesh Bohra, Stephane Lauzon and Peter Schlemmer onsite

entry.title: I'm facing issue while registering for External Authentication in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: I'm facing issue while registering for External Authentication in SAP Build Process Automation. It returns a Blank screen and registration doesn't complete.

entry.title: Unrestricted stock in storage locations for maintenance orders using fiori apps
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We are implementing the corrective maintenance process (BH1) in S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, and are aiming to manage everything through Fiori apps. During testing, we encountered an issue: when a maintenance order consumes a material that is out of stock in any storage location, the system allows the process to proceed without showing any error or message in the Fiori app (Create/Change Maintenance Order).

For example, when performing the same process in the SAP GUI transaction (IW31/IW32), the system displays the unrestricted-use stock as a field in the storage location search help, as shown below:

However, when we open the storage location search help in the Fiori app, the stock information is not available:

We would like to know if there is a similar functionality that allows us to view unrestricted-use stock in specific storage locations, similar to the SAP GUI, or if there is an option to activate a warning message. Alternatively, is it possible to extend the search help functionality in the Fiori app to add the stock fields using ABAP code ?

 

Thank you in advance for your help and best regards!

entry.title: What tools are to be used to extract data from a SAP-CRM CDB file?
entry.content: My Client had given me a backup in a CDB file for the SAP-CRM and asked me to extract its contents. What tools I should use? I have no CRM application so I expect to have a trial version if any.

entry.title: SAP MDK - How to access object information from a Card Collection?
entry.content:
Hello community !

I have an MDK application which on the home page has a Card Collection:



When you click on one of the cards, navigation to a details page is activated:

But when I get to this screen, I see everything empty:

How can I access the object I select? Is there a way to send the object ID between views and access specific information about a particular object? In the detail view I am using "Key Value Item" type controls.

Navigation is simple, I don't know if I need to configure something extra here:

Thanks for your help !

entry.title: Re: Applying the pipeline concept for an integration scenario in general
entry.content:
Hi

"so you need to encode the XSLT before uploading to the Partner Directory."

Is this Base64 encodings, or literally blocks of eight 0's and 1's ?

Regards

Steve

entry.title: Re: Email Missing Time Sheet Entries (SAP) - Target Hours
entry.content: Hey Owen! So, basically if the client is having CATS Classic and not implemented Successfactors it is not possible to use the app "Schedule overhead accounting jobs" and use the template for reminder to employees for missed timesheet?

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - How to access object information from a Car...
entry.content:
MDK will automatically pass the selected object as the default object binding to the next page.

In this case, from your screen shots it looks like the Card Collection is bound to the NOTICIA entity set.  This means that the selected record from the NOTICIA entity set will be the default object for the detail page.  The binding in the KeyValue should then just need to be the property name under NOTICIA.

In your screen shot it looks like you are binding to {NOTICIA/TITULO} and {NOTICIA/CUERPO}.  Given that the default object is a record in NOTICIA.  The binding should then just need to be {TITULO} and {CUERPO}.

Give that a shot and see if it works then.

entry.title: Re: Asset Write-up (ABZU) for Prior Fiscal year in Prior...
entry.content: What errors did you get?

entry.title: Stock selection process during the creation of picking tasks
entry.content:
We have a question regarding the stock selection process during the creation of picking tasks in the warehouse management system in S/4HANA Public Cloud. Generally, a FIFO rule is used for stock selection during picking, making the automatic warehouse task creation functionality generally valid. However, in some specific cases, the client requires the ability to pick certain handling units (HUs), allowing the user to manually select the HUs they wish to pick for a particular delivery during the creation of the picking task. This would be similar to the functionality in EWM when creating picking tasks in the "Stock Can Be Removed" tab.

We use the Create Pick Warehouse Tasks button in the Manage Outbound Delivery Orders APP, with this option the system does not allow us to select specific HUs; is it possible to do this manual selection in warehouse management S/4HANA Public Cloud?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Stock selection process during the creation of pickin...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Yes, in the S/4HANA Public Edtion system, this functionality is also available. Inside the Manage Outbound Delivery Orders APP, I would recommend checking the button "Related Apps" - Go to the APP "Create Warehouse Tasks".

Then the view will be quite similar to the EWM On-prem product, you can select the HU when creating picking tasks in the "Stk Can Be Removed" tab. 

Please follow up there if you have further questions.

 

Thank you and best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Re: New NSQ Location Group Member.
entry.content:
Hi, @caseydevlin and @seanlavelle:

Thanks for joining the group! If you have recommendations for a meet-up (a convenient date/time, place you'd like to go to), let us know. It's been more than a year since our last one, so we're way past due (and we do like to give people the option to make suggestions: https://community.sap.com/t5/newtown-square-discussions/nsq-stammtisch-in-may-where-would-you-like-to-meet/td-p/255059).

All the best,

--Jerry

entry.title: Re: System error when used t.code KSH3
entry.content: Cause of error is cost center group assigned to standard hierarchy without Creation. Same issue we faced. First you have to find out which cost center group assigned without Creation by FM- BAPI_costcentergroup_getlistview. You will get which cost center groups damaged. After Creation of those damages groups ,you will able to see KSH3/2 tcode

entry.title: Webinar on eSocial S-1.3 - Potencializando a experiência da solução SAP
entry.content:
If you are a SAP customer or partner in Brazil, don't miss an exclusive online event focused on the implementation of the eSocial S-1.3 layout. This webinar is specifically tailored for companies that are looking to effectively prepare for the upcoming changes.

Agenda:

  • Overview of SAP's work plan for the new version of eSocial
  • Scope of version S-1.3
  • Details of the S-1210 event in S-1.3
  • Using the S-1210 event in practice
  • Q&A

Check out this blog post for information about the event. 

To register for this event, we kindly ask that you use your corporate email address. This session will be conducted in Brazilian Portuguese.

Register here

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate Project manager Certification
entry.content: Hi Omar, thanks for the reply. Yes, I completed both ACT100and ACT200. On my way!

entry.title: SAP Commerce 2205 Patch 28 Upgrade Running into ClassCastException
entry.content:
We recently upgraded our on-prem SAP Commerce 2205 from Patch 11 to Patch 28 and are running into a platform issue where the GenericItemEntityStateCacheUnit.getEntityState() method is running into ClassCastException.

The issue won't happen immediately but happens after few hours of the server being UP. We are yet to figure out any root cause, but has someone already faced similar issue? Any pointers will be greatly appreciated.

 

I've attached exception trace in the ticket. Here is the snippet of the final caused by.

Caused by: de.hybris.platform.persistence.hjmp.HJMPException: illegal exception type: java.lang.ClassCastException
at de.hybris.platform.persistence.GenericBMPBean$GenericItemEntityStateCacheUnit.getEntityState(GenericBMPBean.java:2030) ~[coreserver.jar:?]
at de.hybris.platform.persistence.GenericBMPBean.loadData(GenericBMPBean.java:228) ~[coreserver.jar:?]

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - How to access object information from a Car...
entry.content: Hi Bill, thanks for your help. I'd like to say that was the problem, but it's not. The page still shows empty data.

entry.title: How to delete customers in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
How to delete customers in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to delete customers in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Please see KBA 2742388 - S4HC: How to delete Business Partner, Customer or Supplier Master Data in S/4HANA Cloud which provides the links to the documentation on how to delete business partners.

The KBA gives links to the Best Practice guides where you will find step by step set up instructions and test scripts in the following Scope Items

Information Lifecycle Management (1KA) <<< this one guides on the ILM process over all

Data Protection and Privacy (5LE) <<< This one specifically shows how to set up ILM for Business Partners so would suit your needs.

Please follow the steps outlined in 5LE set up instructions and test script which details the process in its entirety.

entry.title: issue connect SAP Crystal reports to INFOR CSD
entry.content:
getting this error when trying to use the Infor JDBC driver.
SAP Crystal Reports Logon Failed. Details: SQL exception: [SQL State:] null [Error Message:] Data Lake is not available

I have tested the driver thru DBeaver and successfully connect to the database.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - How to access object information from a Car...
entry.content: Can you share the detail page definition?

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - How to access object information from a Car...
entry.content:
Yes, this is the complete definition:

 

{
	"Controls": [
		{
			"FilterFeedbackBar": {
				"ShowAllFilters": false,
				"_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
			},
			"_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
			"_Name": "SectionedTable0",
			"Sections": [
				{
					"Separators": {
						"TopSectionSeparator": false,
						"BottomSectionSeparator": true,
						"HeaderSeparator": true,
						"FooterSeparator": true,
						"ControlSeparator": true
					},
					"KeyAndValues": [
						{
							"Value": "{TITULO}",
							"DataSubscriptions": [],
							"_Name": "KeyValueItem0",
							"KeyName": "Título",
							"Visible": true
						}
					],
					"MaxItemCount": 1,
					"_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue",
					"_Name": "SectionKeyValue0",
					"Visible": true,
					"EmptySection": {
						"FooterVisible": false
					},
					"Layout": {
						"NumberOfColumns": 2
					}
				},
				{
					"Separators": {
						"TopSectionSeparator": false,
						"BottomSectionSeparator": true,
						"HeaderSeparator": true,
						"FooterSeparator": true,
						"ControlSeparator": true
					},
					"KeyAndValues": [
						{
							"Value": "{CUERPO}",
							"_Name": "KeyValueItem1",
							"KeyName": "Noticia",
							"Visible": true
						}
					],
					"MaxItemCount": 1,
					"_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue",
					"_Name": "SectionKeyValue1",
					"Visible": true,
					"EmptySection": {
						"FooterVisible": false
					},
					"Layout": {
						"NumberOfColumns": 2
					}
				},
				{
					"Separators": {
						"TopSectionSeparator": false,
						"BottomSectionSeparator": true,
						"HeaderSeparator": true,
						"FooterSeparator": true,
						"ControlSeparator": true
					},
					"Layout": {
						"LayoutType": "Vertical",
						"HorizontalAlignment": "Leading"
					},
					"_Type": "Section.Type.ButtonTable",
					"_Name": "SectionButtonTable0",
					"Visible": true,
					"EmptySection": {
						"FooterVisible": false
					},
					"Buttons": [
						{
							"Styles": {
								"Button": "MainButton"
							},
							"_Type": "ButtonTable.Type.Button",
							"_Name": "ButtonTableTypeButton0",
							"Title": "No me gusta",
							"Alignment": "Center",
							"ButtonType": "Text",
							"Semantic": "Tint",
							"Image": "sap-icon://heart-2",
							"ImagePosition": "Leading",
							"FullWidth": true,
							"Visible": true,
							"Enabled": true
						}
					]
				}
			]
		}
	],
	"DesignTimeTarget": {
		"Service": "/BTP6S/Services/obfuscated-mdk-btp6s.service",
		"EntitySet": "NOTICIA"
	},
	"_Type": "Page",
	"_Name": "Noticias_Detail",
	"Caption": "Noticia",
	"PrefersLargeCaption": true
}

entry.title: Re: When come to an end, the unknown task occurred during...
entry.content:
thank you for your info. I follow all the upgrade notes but  I did not find if there is a specific note about the unknown task. no title there like previous one for example upgrade sales order, etc.. An about the file, since SQL 2014, sql create the file (reference : https://dba.stackexchange.com/questions/252329/what-is-mdf-mssql-dbcc15-file) but that's an sql part and sap should avoid it except sap display an info in the upgrade wizard window. The unknown task will be certainly questioned by customer. They will ask for what it is and will not agree.

 

Regards,

JImmy

Currently enrolled in some courses here. Any highlighted material or concepts I should look into. Trying to further my knowledge. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Issue displaying data in item list in Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi,

I need a hand regarding an app I'm creating in Build Apps.

I'm building a pretty straight-forward app for our clients to approve their own invoices. It is composed of 4 screens (Authentication, Invoice list, Invoice Details and Account Balance). Basically, after authenticating, the Invoice List page appears, then the user selects an invoice and is taken to the Invoice Details page where she/he can either approve or reject the invoice. If she/he approves the invoice, the number and amount of the invoice appear on the Account Balance page. Each time an invoice is approved, the related data is added to the Balance page.

So I manage to display an approved invoice in the item list of the Balance page. However, when I approve another invoice, it is not added to the previously approved one on the Balance page: it replaces it.

Below you will find several screenshots showing how I configured both Invoice Details page and Balance page: could you please give a look to see what I am missing please? I also joined a short video.

Here is the app variable I defined, named “approvedInvoice” (list of 3 objects), where I want to store the data of the invoices that are being approved:

Here is the logic flow I added to the Approve button ("Set app variable", where I added the app variable I created in the properties and assign the value with a custom list):

When I click on the Custom list of the Assigned value from the above screen, here is what I configured (DATA ENTITY TEST being my data source, the one from which I get all the data of my invoices that are display in the Invoices page):

Here is how I configured the Open Page properties ("approvedInvoice" being my page parameter):

And here you can see how I configured my list item in the Balance page:

See the video here for better understanding (N.B.: as you will notice, I'm currently displaying the client name in place of the amount, it is just temporary and does not change the problem raised in this post):

This is what happens when I approve more than one invoice: approved invoices don't pile up, only the latest approved one is displayed...

Would you be so kind and give me just a hint to solve this please? I'm stuck on this for a week now and it is blocking the whole project...

Many thanks beforehand for your help and I'm looking forward to reading you.

BR,

LM.

entry.title: Re: NT 2020.001, versão 1.50 – Evento de manifestação do...
entry.content: Eu já marquei como resolvido pela resposta do Felipe acima. A SAP só vai fazer para o clientes que tem DRC o GRC está sendo descontinuado e eles estão fazendo no GRC apenas as NTs com Obrigação legal, Seria necessário solicitar o suporte EoD (Expertise on Demand) onde o cliente teria que pagar pela solução para a SAP.

entry.title: Re: NT 2020.001, versão 1.50 – Evento de manifestação do...
entry.content: Eu já marquei como resolvido pela resposta do Felipe acima. A SAP só vai fazer para o clientes que tem DRC o GRC está sendo descontinuado e eles estão fazendo no GRC apenas as NTs com Obrigação legal, Seria necessário solicitar o suporte EoD (Expertise on Demand) onde o cliente teria que pagar pela solução para a SAP.

Can you please help us know, if SAP is also aligning with SAP Partners to further their cause with Universities becoming members of Universities Alliance and help Universities to use the full potential of SAP Next Gen?

We are a SAP Partner company with multi-years experienced SAP Architects working with us and would like to take this cause further in Indian market as well in other global market.

Any guidance from your end will be helpful.

Regards,

Aman Jain

Innosight Uk Ltd

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba: Contracts why is there no Learning System
entry.content:
Hi Jennifer,

I just added that system and the strange thing is the name of it then changed to SAP Ariba Contracts: Creating Contracts with Enhanced Contract Authoring, very odd.

Looks like the one I want though so thanks for directing me to the right coded system.

Lee

entry.title: Re: PA_SE_IN please could you advise when the latest pack...
entry.content:
SFIHCM is used for the talent integration ie without Employee Central

PA SE IN is used for integration with Employee central and it follows SF release schedule ie every 6 months we release new SP level for it as it applies on ECC or S4.

PA SE IN would be replaced ECS4HCM

https://me.sap.com/notes/3244367/E

Important information when upgrading from PA_SE_IN to ECS4HCM

Check your scenarios being used

entry.title: SAP Build Extensibility Wizard for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Target Group

Anyone interested to know more about extending SAP S/4HANA Cloud using SAP Build

 

Background

What is Extensibility

When a customer has unique business requirements that are not fully catered by standard SAP S/4HANA then there is a need to extend the system. These extensions can be classified into 2 broad categories:

  • On-stack extensibility involves extending SAP S/4HANA directly within the core system using key user tools or ABAP.
  • Side-by-side extensibility uses SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) to develop custom applications or integrations outside the core S/4HANA system, ensuring greater flexibility and upgrade safety.

 

What is SAP Build

SAP Build ( including SAP Build Code) is the default extension development toolset on SAP BTP.

Build Tools under low-code spectrum:

  • SAP Build Apps - Create Mobile and Web applications
  • SAP Build Process Automation - Automate business processes and workflows
  • SAP Build Work Zone - Create Digital Workspaces and business sites

Build Tools under Pro-code spectrum:

SAP Build Code - Use Business Application Studio(BAS) and Cloud Application programming Model(CAP) to create Applications. And lot more.

 

What were some of the challenges in Extensibility:

  • Not easy to identify the available extension options for a given S/4HANA application directly in the system
  • Not easy to determine the right extension points (eg APIs, Events) for a given S/4HANA application
  • Not an integrated experience when extending SAP S/4HANA in a side-by-side manner on BTP

 

Introduction

  • A new Extensibility wizard is available with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 that provides both on-stack and side-by-side extension options consolidated into a single wizard.
  • It provides a guided experience to kick start extension creation and enables seamless navigation from SAP S/4HANA to SAP Build.
  • The wizard understands which S/4HANA application it has been started from and accordingly filters the extensions points( like API, Events) based on the business context.

 

This wizard can be accessed from any extensible SAP S/4HANA app as shown below.

"Create Extension" option is available under the Me Area (User menu) on the top right.

On clicking the Create Extension option, the Extensibility Wizard opens up displaying the various extension options

Note: Setup steps mentioned next are needed as a prerequisite to be able to see the "Create Extension" option

 

Setup

Short summary of the setup steps:

  1. Subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation in your SAP BTP subaccount.
  2. Add your SAP S/4HANA cloud system in the BTP Global account under System landscape and register in a formation.
  3. Create 2 destinations in the BTP account pointing to UI service and API service of SAP S/4HANA. This is needed for communication from Build to SAP S/4HANA, for example to fetch business context, events and authorizations.
  4. Create a communication arrangement in SAP S/4HANA. This is to enable communication from SAP S/4HANA to SAP Build.
  5. Assign the required authorization in SAP S/4HANA to access the wizard.

 

Detailed setup steps:

BTP setup steps - link

S4 setup steps - link

 

Extensions options Available currently ( Sep 2024 )

On-stack

Custom Field

Enables addition of new fields in desired business objects. The wizard opens the Custom Field App with the business contexts pre set.

 

Custom Logic

Enables addition of custom logic via Cloud BAdIs. Here as well the wizard opens the Custom Logic App with the business contexts pre set.

 

Side-by-Side

Custom Process

Create a Process in SAP Build Process Automation that starts based on an event from SAP S/4HANA. The business context of the starting SAP S/4HANA app is pre set in the wizard to easily identify the relevant events.

A detailed explanation of this extension option is available in <to be added> blog from my colleague.

 

The extensibility wizard is expected to grow with more extension options in future.

 

Conclusion

The new SAP Build Extensibility wizard for SAP S/4HANA cloud public Edition provides a simple guided experience to create extensions both on-stack and side-by-side.

If you have access to an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system, follow the setup steps and do explore the Extensibility Wizard !

entry.title: Re: The benefits of integrating SAP Transportation Management with a Geographic Information System (
entry.content:
Hi Adrien, 

Thank you for this very interesting read. I would have one question please, juste to make sure I got it right : regarding geo-routing, does that mean that with GIS integration, there is no more need to manage and store transportation lanes between the locations/zones ? Would the GIS integration propose these routes dynamically during planning without using the transportation lane master data ?  

Or should we still manage transportation lanes, but without the need to manually put distances and durations between locations or zones ?

Thank you in advance.

entry.content:
Welcome to Techtoberfest! This is an event in which you post your desk, office, or coding setup of some kind.

All Devtoberfest Week 2, you will be able to post and share pictures of your tech setup for all to see!

The Friday before Week 2, there will be a link in this event to the discussion where pictures should be shared. Check back then for the link!

As this is just the event page, comments here may not be counted to your Devtoberfest point total so be sure you’re in the right place before posting the pictures.

Sudhir.

entry.title: Leverage Previous Experience
entry.content:
• If you’ve done similar work outside of Upwork, mention it in your proposals. Clients want to know you can deliver, even if you don’t have an Upwork history yet.
  • Include testimonials or references from previous employers or clients if possible.

entry.title: Optimize Your Profile with Keywords
entry.content: Include relevant keywords in your profile so it’s more likely to show up in client searches. Think about what clients are searching for, and tailor your profile to reflect those skills.

entry.title: SAP Enable Now - Software Downloads
entry.content:
We have upcoming SEN on-premise upgrade and still in progress of checking/analyzing the upgrade as a newbie.

One of them is software downloads to assess the installer that we are going to use.

Upon checking, SAP enable now author maintenance product have 2 entries, one is author option and the other is author option 1.0. May I know what the difference is between the 2?

Also, the only options there is win32. If our server using the win64, may I know if there is an effect to it?

entry.title: Re: Will 'Refund Control' = 'Create Credit Memo Request' trigger the 'Credit Memo Request' Workflow?
entry.content:
Hi @OwenLiu
Could you please explain how this falls under 'Sourcing and Procurement'?
My scenario is about Customer Returns, so I thought this would therefore fall under 'Sales'.

Thank you,

Tu

entry.title: Re: Will 'Refund Control' = 'Create Credit Memo Request' trigger the 'Credit Memo Request' Workflow?
entry.content: Hi Tu, Yes, you are correct. Could you please do the change accordingly? Sorry for the confusion. Best Regards, Owen

entry.title: What is the Phemex Invitation Code?
entry.content:
What is the Phemex Invitation Code?

The 2024 Phemex Invitation Code is HMXFT5. New users signing up at Phemex.com can use this code, applicable to cryptocurrency spot trading, derivatives, and altcoins. This code is verified and operational today, available in your area.

 

Phemex Invitation CodeHMXFT5
Code ApplicabilitySpot trading, derivatives, and altcoins
Code StatusVerified and operational today
Sign Up Bonus$8,800 and 5100 Phemex Tokens

Phemex Invitation Code “HMXFT5” Benefit

The Phemex Sign-up Bonus offers an enticing opportunity for newcomers, providing a comprehensive package of benefits:

Bonus Details: Upon successful registration and application of the invitation code, users receive a sign-up bonus consisting of $8,800 and 5100 Phemex Tokens.

Maximizing Benefits: The $8,800 portion of the bonus can be used to cover trading fees or offset losses in both spot and futures markets, particularly beneficial for beginners in trading.

Additionally, the 5100 Phemex Tokens offer various advantages, including staking opportunities, vePT earnings, discounts on trading fees, and other perks that enhance the overall trading experience on Phemex.

entry.title: Phemex Invitation Code: HMXFT5 ( New User Sign Up 2024)
entry.content:
Phemex Invitation CodeHMXFT5
New User Sign UpEnter code "HMXFT5"
Code ApplicabilitySpot trading, derivatives, and altcoins
Code StatusVerified and operational today
Sign Up Bonus$8,800 and 5100 Phemex Tokens
